title: Mulch Calculator - Estimate Mulch Needed
description: Free mulch calculator. Calculate how many bags or cubic yards of mulch you need for garden beds, landscaping, and tree rings.
keywords: mulch calculator, how much mulch do I need, mulch estimator, cubic yards mulch, mulch bags
intro: Calculate how much mulch you need. Enter the area dimensions and desired depth to get volume in cubic yards and number of bags.

faq.q: How much mulch do I need?
faq.a: Calculate: Length × Width × Depth (in feet) / 27 = cubic yards. One cubic yard covers about 162 sq ft at 2 inches deep. Standard bags are 2 cu ft each.
2-4 inches is ideal for most applications. 2" for flower beds, 3-4" for weed suppression and tree rings. Don't exceed 4" as it can suffocate roots.
